metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — MN
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for Twin Cities metro area counties.
sources: Minnesota Department of Revenue — Property Tax Division

notes.tax_rate_format: Effective rate per $100 of market value.
notes.scope: Twin Cities metro — Hennepin, Ramsey, Anoka counties.
notes.update_cycle: Assessed values set annually. Levies set by counties, cities, school districts.
notes.assessment_method: Market value × class rate (1.0% first $500K homestead, 1.25% above) = tax capacity. Tax = tax capacity × local levy rate.
notes.veteran_exclusion: $300,000 market value exclusion for 100% P&T disabled veterans — effectively full exemption for most homes.

metadata._comment: Minnesota county property tax data for Culminari for Veterans. MN uses market value exclusion for disabled veterans — not a full exemption but significant ($300K exclusion for 100% P&T).

veteran_exemption_state_law.description: $300,000 market value exclusion for 100% P&T or IU disabled veterans on homestead property. Effectively full exemption for homes valued at $300K or less.

property_tax._note: Effective rate ~1.18% of market value. Minneapolis metro. For homes above $300K, the veteran exclusion covers the first $300K — remainder is taxable.

disabled_veteran_100_pct._note: For a $380K home at 1.18% rate: exemption saves ~$3,540/yr. Remaining $80K taxed at ~$944/yr.

application.deadline: Apply by December 31 for following year

military_installations: Fort Snelling VA Medical Center Campus
Minnesota National Guard HQ (Camp Ripley admin)

property_tax._note: Effective rate ~1.25% of market value. St. Paul metro. For homes at or below $300K, veteran exclusion covers full value.

disabled_veteran_100_pct._note: For median $290K home: full exemption (below $300K threshold). Saves ~$3,625/yr.

application.deadline: Apply by December 31 for following year

property_tax._note: Effective rate ~0.94% of market value. North metro suburb. Lowest effective rate among metro MN counties.

disabled_veteran_100_pct._note: For $330K home: $300K excluded, $30K taxable. Saves ~$2,820/yr of $3,102 total.

application.deadline: Apply by December 31 for following year
